doc_content.summary: Analyzes and suggests improvements for CLAUDE.md files across a project's hierarchy, evaluating them on structure, completeness, accuracy, effectiveness, and hierarchy optimization.
key_features: Hierarchical discovery of CLAUDE.md files and memory objects
Five-dimensional heuristic analysis tailored for AI-agent consumption
Comprehensive observability and metrics tracking per dimension

alt_text: Internal architecture diagram for the stark-claude-md-improver skill showing the discovery, multi-dimensional analysis, user approval, and observability flows.
